THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARK, RALPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1151 POST ST, #12, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-29-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT MOVES OUT BY 5PM 6/29/94 PLTF WILL PAY DEFT $250, REMAINING PERSONAL PROPERTY DEEMED ABANDONED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
